title: Investigate feed-forward vs per-scene reconstruction open question
stumbles: lint_report tool call returned exists=false because the demo corpus has not been linted yet; the agent skipped that source of evidence and continued with what `ask` had already returned.
summary: Investigated the inference-cost-vs-fidelity open question. Read the existing question doc via raw_source, enumerated the LRM-family papers (LRM, LGM, TripoSR) plus the SDS-on-splats family (DreamGaussian, AGG), and used the `ask` tool for a synthesis pass. Extended the question with a concrete four-axis experiment design (held-out PSNR, Chamfer/F-score, wall-clock, amortised GPU-hours) stratified across input categories to expose the thin-structure failure mode.
